title: Car Track Glow in the Dark, Glow Race Tracks Toy with 2 LED Light Race Cars, 360PCS Flexible Race Track Construction Toy Gifts for 3 4 5 6 Year+Boys Girls
features: Glow in Dark Race Track - 360 PCS Race Tracks gets kids excited for night time play ! This 360-piece set includes Glow track and 2 Light-Up Race Car that keep the tracks glowing bright.

Flexible Track Design - Track quickly snaps together & can be bent, looped & flexed in different ways. Children will play by their own rules with endless options and to have limitless possibilities in building different road race tracks for great indoor moments.
Cool LED Light up Track cars - Just snap the pieces together and you get a fully customized speedway of your own creation, and when you turn off the light, Tracks glow super bright.

Safe and Easy to Play - These track extra cars are made by non-toxic plastic materials, which are safe for children. For these racing tracks cars, the switch are at the bottom. The child can easily use it independently and have fun! Comes with 2 toys trucks ,which needs 1xAA battery each (not included).

Best Gift for Kids - The fun and cool glow track set is packaged in a sturdy and beautiful box. Bright colors, great attention to detail, and a variety of accessories make it very valuable. It is an ideal birthday and Christmas gift for boys and girls over 3 years old.
